title: Inspector plane HTTP+WS server with 127.0.0.1 random-port binding (feature-gated)
goal: Per spec §6.5.1 (AC-INSPECTOR-PLANE-BIND) implement the backend inspector plane HTTP+WS server. MUST bind to `127.0.0.1:<random>` only (never `0.0.0.0`), use a per-launch random port discovered via Diagnostics panel or `kernel.inspector.port()`, and be feature-gated behind `cfg(feature = "inspector")` so it is NOT compiled into release builds.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/inspector_read/server.rs implementing the HTTP+WS server (axum + tokio-tungstenite); Cargo.toml feature flag `inspector`; build-time check that release builds with feature off compile without the server code.
unblock_conditions: MT-028 InspectorReadV1 trait exists so the server has a typed read source.
implementation_notes: Per spec §6.5.1. Cargo.toml: add `[features] inspector = ["axum", "tokio-tungstenite"]` and gate the dependencies behind the feature. server.rs is wrapped in `#![cfg(feature = "inspector")]` at the module top so the entire file compiles to nothing without the feature. API: `InspectorServer::start(reader: Arc<dyn InspectorReadV1>) -> InspectorServerHandle` binds via `tokio::net::TcpListener::bind("127.0.0.1:0")` (port 0 = OS-assigned random port). Server uses axum router with read-only GET endpoints: `/inspector/v1/sessions`, `/inspector/v1/sessions/{id}`, `/inspector/v1/event-ledger/tail`, `/inspector/v1/process-ledger/active`, `/inspector/v1/workspace/{ws_id}`, `/inspector/v1/trace/{session_id}`, `/inspector/v1/models`. All handlers call into reader methods. WebSocket endpoint `/inspector/v1/event-stream` for live event tail. Tauri command `#[tauri::command] kernel_inspector_port() -> u16` returns the bound port; this is the single entry point for the Diagnostics panel (cluster X) and external test harnesses (MT-036 swarm). Negative test asserts: (a) binding to 0.0.0.0 fails at compile-time via a const assert or runtime-time fail-loud (use a wrapper that explicitly checks the SocketAddr.ip() before bind), (b) release build without `inspector` feature does NOT include the server module (test via `cargo build --release` + grep symbol list for `InspectorServer`). The HTTP handlers are routed via axum's get() handlers ONLY (no post/put/delete on this path — POST goes to `/inspector/v1/replay-drive` in MT-030). Per spec §6.5.1 the feature gate enforces this is not in release builds.
risk_if_missed: Without the server, the Diagnostics panel cannot read backend state; HBR-VIS-004 trace_projection_inspection has no surface for non-UI work.
validator_focus: Bind to 127.0.0.1 only (negative test attempts 0.0.0.0 and fails loud); release build without feature contains zero inspector symbols; per-launch random port is discoverable via Tauri command.

minimum_controls: Release build without feature compiles without server symbols (grep test on release binary).
Only GET handlers on /inspector/v1/* (POST/PUT/DELETE on read paths return 405).
